action.description: Defines automated actions to be performed during an incident, using SSM Automation documents.

chat_channel.description: Specifies chat channels for communication during an incident.

display_name.description: A user-friendly name for the response plan.

engagements.description: Lists contacts or contact methods to engage during an incident.

id.description: Unique identifier for the response plan.

incident_template.description: Template used for creating incidents, including details like impact, tags, and notification targets.

integration.description: Integrations with third-party services, such as PagerDuty, for incident management.

name.description: The name of the response plan.

tags.description: Key-value pairs used to organize and categorize the response plan.
